sentences.text: In winter, he had no fruit or flowers to sell, so he was cold and hungry.
Hans was lonely in winter because the Miller never visited him.
The Miller said he should not visit Hans in winter because people in trouble need to be alone.
He said he would visit Hans in spring and get flowers, which would make Hans happy.
